title: 我是谁
prompt_en: Practice introducing yourself with I am. Say your name age nationality and identity.
prompt_zh: 练习用I am自我介绍：姓名、年龄、国籍、身份。
description: 掌握I am + 名字/年龄/国籍/身份的基本句型，以及否定句I am not。
knowledge_points: be动词 自我介绍 I am 否定句
teaching_markdown: ## 开口顺序 | | 先说 Hello/Hi，再说 I am + 名字。可以说 I am a student / I am from China / I am 20 years old。 | | **注意**：中文说"我学生"，英语必须说 I am a student，am 不能少。

title: 你是谁
prompt_en: Practice asking about others with You are. Learn to greet compliment and confirm.
prompt_zh: 练习用You are询问他人：问候、赞美、确认。
description: 掌握You are + 形容词/身份的用法，以及Are you?疑问句。
knowledge_points: be动词 You are 问候 疑问句
teaching_markdown: ## 核心句型 | | You are + 形容词 用来夸别人：You are kind / You are smart。 | | Are you a student? 是问句，回答 Yes, I am. 或 No, I'm not. | | **对比**：I am 说自己，You are 说对方。

title: 它是什么
prompt_en: Practice describing things with It is. Learn size color temperature and evaluation.
prompt_zh: 练习用It is描述事物：大小、颜色、温度、评价。
description: 掌握It is + 形容词/名词的描述句型，以及否定和疑问式。
knowledge_points: be动词 It is 描述 颜色 大小
teaching_markdown: ## 描述三步 | | 1. 说是什么：It is a book. | 2. 说怎么样：It is big / It is red. | 3. 说天气：It is hot today. | | 否定句：It is not big. It is small.（不是大的，是小的） | 疑问句：Is it good? Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.

title: 他们在哪里
prompt_en: Practice talking about locations with is/are. Learn prepositions and Where questions.
prompt_zh: 练习用be动词谈论位置：介词和Where问句。
description: 掌握物品位置和人物所在位置的表达，以及否定句。
knowledge_points: be动词 位置 Where 地点 介词
teaching_markdown: ## 位置表达 | | 用 on（在……上）/ in（在……里）/ at（在……点）描述位置： | - The book is on the desk. | - It is in the bag. | - They are at home. | | 问位置：Where is my phone? — It is here. | 否定：He is not at home. He is at work.

title: 他/她是谁
prompt_en: Practice describing others with He/She is. Learn relationships occupations and appearance.
prompt_zh: 练习用He/She is描述他人：关系、职业、外表。
description: 掌握第三人称be动词的用法，以及否定和疑问句。
knowledge_points: be动词 He is She is 描述 他人
teaching_markdown: ## 描述他人 | | He / She 代替男生/女生： | - She is my friend. / He is a doctor. | - He is from Japan. / She is 25 years old. | | 并列描述：He is kind and smart.（他又善良又聪明） | | 否定：He is not my brother. He is my cousin. | 疑问：Is she your sister? — No, she is my friend.

title: 我们/他们
prompt_en: Practice using We are and They are to describe groups. Learn plural forms.
prompt_zh: 练习用We are和They are描述群体：复数和集体表达。
description: 掌握复数be动词We are/They are的用法，以及否定句。
knowledge_points: be动词 We are They are 复数 群体
teaching_markdown: ## 复数表达 | | We = 我们，They = 他们/它们。后面用 are，不用 is： | - We are good friends. | - They are from the same city. | | 否定：We are not late. We are on time. | 疑问：Are they your friends? — Yes, they are. | | **规律**：I → am / He/She/It → is / You/We/They → are

title: 打招呼与告别
prompt_en: Practice greetings and farewells in English. Learn how to say hello goodbye and basic polite expressions.
prompt_zh: 练习英语打招呼和告别：问候、再见、礼貌用语。
description: 掌握Good morning/afternoon/evening问候、告别用语和礼貌表达。
knowledge_points: 打招呼 告别 问候 礼貌用语
teaching_markdown: ## 问候与告别 | | **打招呼**： | - Good morning!（早上好） | - Nice to meet you!（很高兴认识你） | - Long time no see!（好久不见） | | **告别**： | - See you later!（回头见） | - Have a nice day!（祝你愉快） | - Take care!（保重） | - Welcome!（欢迎！） | | 这些是固定短语，直接整体记忆即可。

title: 简单闲聊
prompt_en: Practice small talk conversations. Learn how to chat about weather weekend and daily life.
prompt_zh: 练习简单闲聊：天气、周末、日常生活话题。
description: 掌握How's it going? Where are you from? 等闲聊表达。
knowledge_points: 闲聊 日常对话 社交 问候
teaching_markdown: ## 闲聊四句 | | **随意问候**： | - How's it going? — Pretty good. | - What's up? — Not much. | | **常用话题**： | - Nice weather today!（天气真好） | - How was your weekend? — It was great!（周末过得怎么样？） | - Where are you from? — I'm from China.（你来自哪里？） | - What do you do? — I'm a student.（你是做什么的？） | - It's nice to see you again!（再次见到你很高兴！） | | 先记住这些固定问句和回答，以后慢慢学语法。
